news.summary: In San Francisco, Salesforce, a leading AI CRM company listed on NYSE with the ticker CRM, has announced a new pricing structure for Agentforce to cater to the rising need for digital labor across various facets of businesses. The company aims to address the surging demand for AI adoption, which is progressing rapidly. Despite the acceleration in AI implementation, many Chief Information Officers (CIOs) are finding it challenging to balance cost management with the necessity for innovation. Data from Salesforce’s CIO AI Trends research revealed that 90% of respondents face constraints in controlling AI expenses.
news.headline: Salesforce launches flexible Agentforce pricing to meet growing demand for digital labor. AI adoption rises rapidly, with 90% of CIOs facing challenges in managing costs.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL) revealed a key partnership with Twilio Segment to assist businesses in consolidating customer data, identifying behavioral patterns, and providing tailored digital experiences on a large scale. The collaboration, introduced at Twilio’s SIGNAL 2025 event, involves Amplitude endorsing Twilio Segment as the premier customer data platform (CDP), while Twilio will advocate for Amplitude as the premier digital analytics solution. This partnership aims to streamline data management processes and enhance customer engagement across various platforms.
news.headline: Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL) partners with Twilio Segment to enhance customer data and digital experiences at scale.

news.summary: Thru's recent acquisition by Boomi in Conshohocken, Pa. has bolstered Boomi's managed file transfer (MFT) strength, merging API, application, and file-based data transport into a unified platform.
news.headline: Boomi acquired Thru, Inc. to bolster MFT capabilities, combining API, app, and file transfer on a single platform.

news.summary: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. has introduced GitLab 18, featuring integrated AI capabilities and significant advancements in core DevOps, security, and compliance workflows. These enhancements are currently accessible, with ongoing improvements expected in the future. Moreover, GitLab Premium users can now acquire Duo Enterprise without needing to upgrade to GitLab Ultimate.
news.headline: GitLab releases version 18, introducing AI features to boost developer productivity. Duo Enterprise now available for Premium customers.

news.summary: Danvers, Massachusetts - CCC will be presenting new features that empower academic publishers to automate various promotional and publication incentives for authors. This will streamline the process and provide authors with improved opportunities.
news.headline: CCC introduces expanded RightsLink author services to enable publishers automate promotional offers to authors.

news.summary: In Beverly, Massachusetts, Object First, the creator of Ootbi (Out-of-the-Box-Immutability), a ransomware-proof backup storage appliance tailored for Veeam®, disclosed a remarkable 167% surge in bookings for Q1 2025. This growth showcases a growing momentum as customers and partners recognize the value of immutable backup storage grounded in Zero Trust principles as the most effective safeguard against ransomware and cyber threats. The company's success underscores the global emphasis on data security.
news.headline: Object First reports a 167% increase in global bookings in Q1 2025, highlighting the demand for ransomware-proof backup storage.

news.summary: Today, Tractor Supply Company, based in Brentwood, Tennessee, divulged that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share for the Company's common stock.
news.headline: Tractor Supply Company declares $0.23 per share on common stock as quarterly dividend.

news.summary: In GOLETA, California, HOKA®, a part of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), has introduced the Mafate X, the newest addition to their renowned trail collection. Initially launched 15 years ago at UTMB Mont-Blanc, the Mafate has remained a cornerstone in HOKA's trail shoe lineup. The Mafate franchise, known as a HOKA classic, has been inspiring trail runners worldwide. The Mafate X aims to continue this tradition, offering enhanced comfort and performance to help runners go farther and faster on trails.
news.headline: HOKA launches Mafate X, evolving its iconic trail shoe for modern ultra racing. Original Mafate debuted 15 yrs ago at UTMB. Brand's legacy continues globally.

news.summary: In New York, Regal.ai, a top Voice AI Agent Platform, has unveiled two innovative experiential campaigns, The AI Dog Hotline and The Voice of AI, which have collectively reached an impressive five million impressions within a short span of three months. This showcases the advanced features, human-like qualities, and tailored capabilities of Regal's voice AI technology. Noteworthily, The AI Dog Hotline was introduced on the day of the renowned Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show, enabling dog enthusiasts worldwide to interact with AI replicas of their beloved pets.
news.headline: Regal.ai's AI campaigns 'AI Dog Hotline' and 'The Voice of AI' impress with 5 million impressions in 3 months, highlighting their sophisticated voice AI technology.

news.summary: Big Blue Swim School, a rapidly expanding franchise in the $3 billion learn-to-swim sector, has named Brandon Bean as its new Chief Executive Officer. Bean has more than 20 years of experience in leading franchise and multi-unit operations, notably as the co-founder and CEO of Lumin Fitness, a technology-driven fitness brand. Prior to his role at Lumin Fitness, he held the position of Chairman and CEO at Gold’s Gym. This move marks a significant step for Big Blue Swim School as they continue to grow in the industry.
news.headline: Big Blue Swim School names Brandon Bean CEO, with 20 years of experience in franchise industry.

news.summary: In a recent report released by Rithum, it was shown how returns are influencing the retail sector leading up to 2025. This report highlighted the need for brands and retailers to take proactive steps to safeguard their profits in response to changing consumer demands.
news.headline: Rithum's 2025 report highlights consumer expectations and strategic opportunities for retailers, as returns reshape retail industry.

news.summary: Xponential Fitness, Inc. revealed that Mark King, the current CEO, plans to retire from his positions as CEO and Director due to health concerns. As a primary global franchisor of boutique health and wellness brands, Xponential Fitness operates under the NYSE ticker symbol XPOF. King will remain in his role during the search for a successor to guarantee a seamless transition.
news.headline: Xponential Fitness CEO Mark King announces retirement due to health reasons, will stay as CEO during search for successor.

news.summary: Discover an ocean of excitement in Brooklyn, NY at the New York Aquarium during the Ocean Shell-a-bration Weekend, which is a festive three-day event highlighting the crucial importance of oceans in our lives.
news.headline: New York Aquarium hosts Ocean Shell-a-bration Weekend starting June 6 to celebrate oceans' importance.
TRUMP’S TRADE WAR RISKS US CAPITAL FLIGHT, WARNS HEDGE FUND ELLIOTT- FT
China to tighten control over AI data centers - The Information.

news.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association will be holding the 2025 Women in Fiber Luncheon at Fiber Connect 2025 in Nashville, Tennessee. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, June 3, running from 12:00 PM to 1:30 PM CT. A donation to Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library, which offers book gifts monthly to over 3 million children in five countries, will be made for each ticket sold for the luncheon. This year’s luncheon will focus on celebrating women in the fiber industry.
news.headline: Dolly Parton's Imagination Library partners with Fiber Broadband Association for Women in Fiber Luncheon at Fiber Connect 2025; program gifts 3 million books monthly to children in five countries.

news.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) unveiled the finalists for the 2025 FBA Awards, chosen from a pool of close to 100 submissions. This initiative honors exceptional accomplishments within the fiber broadband sector. The winners are set to be revealed during the FBA Awards Luncheon at Fiber Connect 2025 in Nashville, Tenn. These finalists epitomize the core of our industry, encompassing pioneers, visionaries, and champions who actively drive progress.
news.headline: Fiber Broadband Association unveils finalists for 2025 Awards from a pool of 100 submissions, winners to be announced at Luncheon.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, DNMiner, a cryptocurrency service provider based in Hong Kong, revealed its latest user-friendly cloud mining platform. This platform enables users to mine popular digital currencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin without the need for specialized hardware or technical knowledge. DNMiner's new offering aims to provide a convenient entry point for individuals worldwide into cryptocurrency mining. The platform features daily payouts, automated processes, and various affordable plans, allowing users to engage in the crypto economy with minimal initial investment. In contrast to traditional mining methods that demand expensive equipment and ongoing maintenance, DNMiner manages all mining operations for its users.
news.headline: DNMiner introduces cloud mining platform for Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and more, enabling individuals worldwide to mine cryptocurrencies without specialized hardware. With daily payouts and automated processes, it offers affordable plans for easy entry into crypto mining.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, SIXT, a prominent provider of premium mobility services, has been crowned the top Rental Car Company in the United States in the 2025 USA TODAY 10Best Readers’ Choice Awards. This accolade, determined by reader votes, signifies the excellence endorsed by customers. SIXT stands out for its exceptional customer service, top-tier vehicle selection, and progressive expansion throughout North America following its establishment.
news.headline: SIXT named #1 Rental Car Company in USA Today 10Best Reader’s Choice Awards 2025 for top customer experience and growth.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Resmed, a prominent health technology company specializing in sleep, breathing, and home care, was announced as the Official Sleep Partner for the Qatar Airways British & Irish Lions Tour to Australia. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for Resmed (NYSE: RMD, ASX: RMD), highlighting its expertise in the field. The collaboration underscores the company's role in supporting the tour's participants and promoting optimal sleep health during the event. The inclusion of Resmed in this prestigious tour reflects its dedication to enhancing sleep quality and respiratory care on a global scale.
news.headline: Resmed named Official Sleep Partner of Qatar Airways British & Irish Lions Tour to Australia 2025. (Numbers: May 15, 2025, NYSE: RMD, ASX: RMD)
Rogers Xfinity TV provides the largest content selection in Canada. #entertainment #Canada

news.summary: According to reports, the current unemployment rate in the country has reached 7.5%, reflecting a sharp increase compared to last year's rate of 5.2%. This surge in unemployment has impacted approximately 2 million individuals, with many losing their jobs due to the economic slowdown caused by the global pandemic. The government has implemented various measures to support those affected, including financial assistance and job retraining programs. Experts are optimistic that with these interventions, the unemployment rate will gradually decrease in the coming months as the economy begins to recover.
news.headline: New Fresca Salads and Wraps now available at El Pollo Loco. Check out the latest offerings from the restaurant.
German Finance Minister: We need to increase revenues through higher economic growth, the only way to gain new fiscal room for manoeuvre.
GERMAN COUNCIL OF TAX EXPERTS EXPECTS 0.6 BLN EUR LESS IN TAX REVENUES FOR FEDERAL GOVT THIS YEAR VS OCT FORECAST
German Finance Minister expects slight relief from 2027 onwards with higher tax revenues.

news.summary: The National Association of Realtors and Realtor.com's 2025 Housing Affordability & Supply report reveals the U.S. housing market requires 367,000 more listings at a maximum price of $170,000, 416,000 more priced at or below $255,000, and 364,000 more under $340,000. The report categorizes 44% of the largest metropolitan areas as "Areas Stuck in the Middle," 30% as "Areas Getting Closer to Balance," and 26% as "Areas Falling Further Behind." Montana, Idaho, California, Massachusetts, and Hawaii face severe shortages of affordable housing. Households earning $75,000 annually can afford 21.2% of listings, up from 20.8% in 2024 but far below pre-pandemic levels (nearly 49%). Similarly, households earning $100,000 annually can afford 37.1% of listings, a decrease from 64.7% in 2019. Low-income households earning $50,000 can only afford 8.7% of listings currently. Nationwide, for-sale housing inventory increased by nearly 20% in March 2025 compared to the previous year, but the market still has a long way to go to reach pre-pandemic conditions. Nadia Evangelou, NAR's senior economist, notes the housing market is at a turning point and praises the increase in supply benefiting middle-income homebuyers. The report emphasizes the ongoing housing affordability gap in the U.S. and suggests that more listings need to be priced in alignment with various income levels to achieve market balance.
news.headline: US housing market needs more affordable listings; households earning $75,000 can afford only 21.2% listings, up from 20.8%.

news.summary: Lipella Pharmaceuticals will be showcasing the Phase 2a findings for LP-10 in treating Oral Lichen Planus at the upcoming 2025 AAOM/EAOM International Meeting. This presentation is a significant opportunity for the company to share crucial data regarding the effectiveness of their product. It highlights their commitment to research and development in delivering innovative solutions within the pharmaceutical industry. This event will gather professionals and experts from around the world, providing a platform to discuss and exchange insights on various advancements in the field. Lipella Pharmaceuticals' involvement in this meeting underscores their dedication to addressing oral health issues and potentially improving the quality of life for individuals affected by Oral Lichen Planus. The Phase 2a results will be a focal point of discussion at this prestigious gathering, offering valuable information to attendees and potentially shaping future developments in this area of research. This presentation is poised to make a significant impact and contribute to the ongoing dialogue surrounding treatment options for Oral Lichen Planus.
news.headline: Lipella Pharmaceuticals to showcase Phase 2a data for LP-310 in Oral Lichen Planus at 2025 AAOM/EAOM International Meeting.

news.summary: Forming a strategic partnership with a U.S. distributor is seen as a significant move to gain access to the lucrative $4 billion U.S. market. This collaboration is expected to open up new opportunities and increase market share for the involved parties. The partnership aims to leverage the distributor's network and resources to maximize reach and sales in the competitive U.S. market. This move is viewed as a critical step towards expanding business and tapping into the vast potential of the U.S. market.
news.headline: LOBO EV Tech Ltd. signs $6M agreement to provide 5,000 EVs to U.S., aiming to tap into $4B market via partnership.

news.summary: Successful collaborations with CPO switches highlight the ecosystem's preparedness for advancing AI networks in terms of scale-up and scale-out capabilities. These key milestones underscore the transition towards next-generation networks powered by artificial intelligence technologies.
news.headline: Broadcom unveils 3rd-gen Co-Packaged Optics tech with 200G/lane; shows partner milestones for AI networks.

news.summary: A company has exceeded 450 accounts in 24 countries due to a significant increase in global demand for fingerprint drug testing.
news.headline: Intelligent Bio Solutions sees growing demand for fingerprint drug testing, with 450 accounts across 24 countries.

news.summary: PharmAla has introduced Phenesafe AI, a personalized technology stack that streamlines the identification of novel molecules similar to MDMA. This innovative tool enables quick discovery of new compounds with similar properties, enhancing research efficiency.
news.headline: PharmAla Biotech introduces Phenesafe AI platform for finding MDMA-like molecules, revolutionizing drug discovery.

news.summary: In Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec, on May 15, 2025, Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. announced the acquisition of a 100% interest in a contiguous claim block in Lincoln County, southeastern Nevada. The block consists of 14 unpatented lode claims on the southern flank of the Clover Mountains, approximately 140 km northeast of Las Vegas. Each claim covers 8.36 hectares, with a combined area of 117.06 hectares. These claims are situated on Bureau of Land Management (BLM) land that is not within any conservation areas. Globex Mining Enterprises Inc.'s stock is listed as GMX on the Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on various other stock exchanges in Europe, and GLBXF on the OTCQX International in the US.
news.headline: Globex Mining acquires 100% interest in 14 unpatented lode claims in Nevada's Clover Mountains, totaling 117.06 hectares.
Clean energy company completes successful drill program at Hatchet Uranium Property, shares corporate update.

news.summary: After a brief hiatus, Jim Schreiner is set to resume his role as Chief Operating Officer. Dave Henry will take over as the new head of the Materials Solutions Division. These changes come amidst a period of growth for the company, with revenues surpassing $500 million and a workforce of over 2000 employees. The transition is expected to be smooth, leveraging Schreiner's previous experience and Henry's fresh perspective in guiding the division through its next phase of development.
news.headline: MKS Instruments appoints new COO and Materials Solutions Division leader. Jim Schreiner returns as COO.
German Council of Tax Experts Expects €81.2 bln less in total tax revenues in 2025-2029 vs October forecast.

news.summary: An artificial intelligence company has achieved a significant milestone with its gross profit turning positive after securing its largest deal to date. The company is making strides by expanding its presence in both luxury and affordable multifamily markets. This notable achievement comes as the company continues to grow and make its mark in the industry.
news.headline: Cloudastructure's Q1 revenue surged by 212% in 2025, with gross profit turning positive. The company secured its largest deal and expanded into luxury and affordable multifamily markets.

news.summary: In recent news from Dubai on May 15, 2025, Vantage Drilling International Ltd. revealed a net loss amounting to around $18.9 million or $1.42 per diluted share for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. This is in contrast to the previous year's net loss of about $2.9 million or $0.22 per diluted share for the same period. This data is calculated on the basis of the weighted average shares outstanding during the respective quarters.
news.headline: Vantage Drilling reports Q1 2025 net loss of $18.9 million, $1.42 per share, vs. $2.9 million, $0.22 per share in Q1 2024.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, MKS Instruments, Inc. revealed that its shareholders, under NASDAQ symbol MKSI, have sanctioned the rebranding of the company to "MKS Inc." starting May 16, 2025. MKS, a prominent global technology provider, specializes in transformative solutions.
news.headline: MKS Instruments changes name to MKS Inc, effective May 16, 2025, approved by shareholders.

news.summary: SentinelOne, based in Mountain View, California, has announced that its Purple AI™, Singularity™ Cloud Security, and Singularity™ Hyperautomation services have received FedRAMP-High Authorization. This approval allows the services to be used in federal government agencies, ensuring high levels of security compliance. FedRAMP-High Authorization is granted to services that meet stringent security standards set by the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program. SentinelOne's services have now been cleared for deployment in government agencies, reflecting their commitment to providing secure solutions.
news.headline: SentinelOne obtains FedRAMP-High authorization for Purple AI, CNAPP, and Hyperautomation solutions in Mountain View, Calif.

news.summary: Stock futures experienced a decline following a significant drop in UnitedHealth's stock due to a reported criminal investigation. Before the market opening, Cisco, Alibaba, Walmart, and CoreWeave showed varying movements in earnings. The Dow Jones futures were impacted by these developments, with UnitedHealth's dive leading the decline while Walmart saw an increase and CoreWeave faced a tumble.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop due to UnitedHealth probe; Walmart up, CoreWeave down. Cisco, Alibaba, Walmart, CoreWeave influence.

news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following Federal Reserve Chair Powell's caution regarding potentially unpredictable inflation in the future. UnitedHealth also saw a significant drop in its stock price due to reports of a criminal investigation. This news resulted in a fall in Dow Jones futures. The cautionary statements from Powell and the criminal probe impacting UnitedHealth have led to uncertainties in the market, with investors closely monitoring the situation.
news.headline: Dow Jones falls with UnitedHealth plunge on criminal probe, Powell warns of volatile inflation.

news.summary: Pottery Barn Teen, a brand under Williams-Sonoma, Inc., a leading digital-first home furnishings retailer, introduced the Dorm Concierge service. This complimentary service aids customers in finding dorm products through Pick Up Near CampusTM. Alongside existing free design services, the Dorm Concierge service enhances Pottery Barn Teen's customer support. This new initiative aims to provide personalized assistance to customers shopping for dorm essentials, catering to their needs with a focus on convenience.
news.headline: Pottery Barn Teen introduces Dorm Concierge to help customers shop for dorm products near campus.

news.summary: The inventory of homes for sale in the United States has increased by nearly 20% compared to a year ago, although it remains significantly lower than pre-pandemic levels.
news.headline: Low-income households struggle as home prices rise; $75,000/yr earners can afford <25% of homes for sale despite 20% increase in inventory.

news.summary: Osaic, Inc. announced the expansion of its Osaic Institutions channel by adding five new credit union-affiliated wealth management programs. These institutions, previously aligned with CUSO Financial Services, part of Atria Wealth Solutions, collectively contribute almost $500 million in client assets. The credit unions will continue to operate as member-owned entities under their existing structures.
news.headline: Osaic adds 5 credit unions to its Institutions channel, bringing in nearly $500 million in combined client assets.

news.summary: A partnership between The Duckhorn Portfolio and Provi has been unveiled, aiming to provide a top-notch ordering system for licensed retailers in California. Duckhorn, a key player in luxury wines in North America, and Provi, the leading online B2B marketplace in the beverage alcohol sector, have joined forces to offer a tailored solution for the state's self-distribution needs. This collaboration highlights Duckhorn's dedication to assisting its trade accounts with effective tools. This move brings together the expertise of these two industry giants to enhance the ordering process for California retailers.
news.headline: Duckhorn Portfolio partners with Provi for online wine ordering in California, enhancing service for retailers.

news.summary: Connect Biopharma Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CNTB) has reported positive results from their global Phase 2 trial for rademikibart, a potential new treatment for asthma and COPD. They have initiated Phase 2 Seabreeze STAT studies to evaluate rademikibart as an adjunct treatment for acute exacerbations in asthma and COPD patients. The company's financial results for the first quarter of 2025 show cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments of $84.0 million as of March 31, 2025, with a strong balance sheet expected to fund operations into 2027. They expect topline data from the Seabreeze STAT studies in the first half of 2026. The data from their global Phase 2 trial showed rademikibart's potential as a novel biologic treatment, with significant improvements in lung function observed. The company is focused on advancing the clinical development of rademikibart and has already completed a positive Type C meeting with the FDA. The company aims to deliver meaningful advancements in care for asthma and COPD patients through rademikibart and is well-positioned for future growth. Connect Biopharma is dedicated to transforming care for asthma and COPD patients, with a focus on acute exacerbations, an area with significant unmet need. For more information, visit www.connectbiopharm.com.
news.headline: Connect Biopharma reported first quarter 2025 financial results with $84.0 million in cash. Initiated Phase 2 studies for asthma and COPD, expecting topline data in 1H 2026. Net loss of $10.3 million for the quarter. Plans expect cash to fund operations into 2027.

news.summary: Novartis is set to unveil findings from 60 abstracts sponsored by the company or investigators, which could revolutionize clinical practices. These groundbreaking insights will be showcased at the upcoming 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting and the European Hematology Association (EHA) 2025 Congress.
news.headline: Novartis to present data from 60 abstracts at ASCO and EHA, aiming to change clinical practice in 2025.

news.summary: Box, Inc. unveiled its latest advancements in the Box AI platform today, introducing a new lineup of AI Agents tailored to revolutionize content management. This includes AI Agents for Search, Deep Research, and improved data extraction. These enhancements will enable customers to extract greater value from their content in Box. The company, known for its Intelligent Content Management platform, continues to innovate and adapt, with its recent announcement a reflection of its commitment to enhancing user experiences. Investors can find Box, Inc. listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BOX.
news.headline: Box introduces new AI platform with AI Agents for content management, including Search, Deep Research, and data extraction.
